title: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Filter Vessels
content:
Client Name: UTE ABEIMA FISIA SALALAH
Specification: Design, Supply and Fabrication of Filter vessels (Qty. 11) (Salalah IWP Desalination Plant)
Year: 2019
Size: Ø 3800 mm X 18000 mm T.L. to T.L. (Horizontal)
Design Pressure / Temperature: 6 Bar(g) @ Design Temp. 90 °C
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
